metadata.name: Automount Storage Devices
metadata.description: Automatically mount storage devices when they are accessed and unmount them when they are no longer in active use, by configuring the automounter
objectives: Install the required packages for the automounter
Configure direct and indirect automounter maps, with resources from a preconfigured NFSv4 server

hosts.name: servera
hosts.description: Autofs client with direct and indirect mounts

tasks.name: Verify autofs package is installed
tasks.description: The autofs package provides the automounter service
tasks.failure_message: The autofs package is not installed
hints: Install autofs: sudo dnf install autofs

tasks.name: Verify direct mount entry in auto.master
tasks.description: The /etc/auto.master file must contain the direct mount configuration
tasks.success_message: Direct mount entry exists in auto.master
tasks.failure_message: Direct mount entry is missing from auto.master

tasks.name: Verify indirect mount entry in auto.master
tasks.description: The /etc/auto.master file must contain the indirect mount configuration
tasks.success_message: Indirect mount entry exists in auto.master
tasks.failure_message: Indirect mount entry is missing from auto.master
hints: This sets up the parent directory for indirect mounts

tasks.name: Verify /etc/auto.direct configuration
tasks.description: The direct map file must configure the mount for /home/student/direct
tasks.success_message: The auto.direct file is configured correctly
tasks.failure_message: The auto.direct file is missing or misconfigured

tasks.name: Verify /etc/auto.indirect configuration
tasks.description: The indirect map file must configure wildcard mounts for subdirectories
tasks.success_message: The auto.indirect file is configured correctly
tasks.failure_message: The auto.indirect file is missing or misconfigured
hints: The * wildcard and & substitution enable dynamic mounting

tasks.name: Verify autofs service is running
tasks.description: The autofs service must be running to handle automount requests
tasks.failure_message: The autofs service is not running
hints: Start the service: sudo systemctl start autofs

tasks.name: Verify autofs service is enabled at boot
tasks.description: The autofs service should start automatically at boot
tasks.success_message: The autofs service is enabled at boot
tasks.failure_message: The autofs service is not enabled at boot
hints: Enable the service: sudo systemctl enable autofs
Or enable and start: sudo systemctl enable --now autofs

tasks.name: Verify direct automount is functional
hints: Access the directory to trigger mount: ls /home/student/direct
Restart autofs: sudo systemctl restart autofs

tasks.name: Verify indirect automount is functional
tasks.description: Accessing subdirectories under /home/student/indirect should trigger automount
hints: Access a subdirectory to trigger mount: ls /home/student/indirect/west
The wildcard should mount serverb:/shares/west to /home/student/indirect/west
